title: Split permission handler by runtime context (interactive / swarm-worker / coordinator) per CC
description:
## Summary

CC dispatches permission handling to three distinct handlers based on runtime context:
- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/interactiveHandler.ts` (main interactive agent) — races hooks, classifier, bridge, channel callbacks, and user input via a resolve-once guard
- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/swarmWorkerHandler.ts` — awaits classifier, then forwards request to leader via mailbox; falls back to null (caller does interactive)
- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/coordinatorHandler.ts` — awaits hooks then classifier sequentially; returns null to fall through to interactive dialog

OC (`src/permissions.rs`) has a single `PermissionManager::check()` for all contexts. There is no runtime dispatch, no swarm-worker mailbox forwarding, and no coordinator sequential-check path.

## Behaviors missing
- Interactive handler: resolve-once guard preventing double-resolution from concurrent races
- Swarm worker: forward to leader via mailbox; await response; abort-signal cancel
- Coordinator: sequential hook-then-classifier with fall-through to interactive

## Parent issue
#531

## References
- CC: hooks/toolPermission/handlers/interactiveHandler.ts:57-531
- CC: hooks/toolPermission/handlers/swarmWorkerHandler.ts:40-156
- CC: hooks/toolPermission/handlers/coordinatorHandler.ts:26-62
- OC: src/permissions.rs (single PermissionManager::check, no dispatch)
